summary: Iter10 — P1 wave (Documents UI + 5 real-LLM Hermes tools) fully verified. Backend: 13/13 pytest pass in /app/backend/tests/test_p1_documents_and_hermes_tools.py (6 documents-endpoint tests + 7 hermes-tools unit tests). All 5 previously-mock tools (generate_communication_summary, suggest_next_best_action, find_opportunities_in_contact, suggest_reply_template, evaluate_action_roi) now return real DeepSeek-backed shapes (summary/sentiment/key_topics, action+owner+urgency+rationale, opportunities list, template+CTA, estimated_roi+rationale+risks) — all ok=true and empty-args correctly rejected with ok=false. Frontend: OPS tab → widget-documents visible alongside existing 5 (crossdept, diagnostics, skills, market, hermes) — clicking opens ops-documents panel with upload-zone, refresh, severity-stats grid (CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW). Uploaded a TXT contract → backend returned severity=high with 3 findings (PAYMENT/TERMINATION/DATA, one CRITICAL) + 3 recommended actions, card auto-expanded at top of list (5 → 6 cards). Russian UI throughout.
critical_code_review_comments: agents/hermes.py is now 785 lines — exceeds the 700-line guideline. Recommend splitting tool implementations into agents/hermes_tools_comms.py (the 5 LLM tools) and keeping agents/hermes.py for orchestration + registry only. Reiterated from iter9.

DocumentsPanel.jsx: refresh button is shown only when stats.total > 0 area is rendered, but on first empty load only EmptyHint shows — uploading a file expands list. Acceptable UX but consider showing severity-stats grid with zeros on first load for visual consistency.

documentsList(undefined, 50) in DocumentsPanel.jsx silently swallows errors with .catch(() => ({documents: []})) — a real 5xx from /api/documents would show as 'empty list' instead of an error banner. Add a fetch-error state alongside loading/empty.

Five new tools in agents/hermes.py all share the same `_parse_fenced_json` + DeepSeek system-prompt boilerplate. Consider extracting a single helper: `async def _llm_json_tool(system, user, fallback_keys)` to DRY the ~70-line repeated pattern across all 5 functions.
seed_data_creation: Backend tests upload 1 TEST_-prefixed doc per run (TEST_p1 contract) → db.documents + MemPalace wing=documents. Frontend test upload creates 1 doc (tmps_*.txt). Total iter10 added ≈ 2 doc rows. No teardown — same policy as iter9.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 wave (DocumentsPanel UI + 5 real LLM Hermes tools) fully working. Regression: pytest backend/tests/test_p1_documents_and_hermes_tools.py -v (50s, all DeepSeek-live). Real OPS widget testids: widget-crossdept (NOT widget-cross-dept), widget-diagnostics, widget-skills, widget-market, widget-hermes, widget-documents. Documents panel auto-expands the just-uploaded doc. /api/documents/upload rejects empty (400) and >10MB (400/413). All 5 'comms' tools live via agents.hermes.HERMES_TOOLS; agents/hermes_max_tools_and_coo.py re-exports the same registry for back-compat.
